plan_type_rationale: Pure ideation and proposal — no code changes, no implementation. Produces a structured self-scan workflow proposal and RAG query plan for CODEREF-CORE eating its own cooking.

phases.name: Current State Audit — What Does CODEREF-CORE Know About Itself?

tasks.description: Measure current header coverage: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const idx=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.coderef/index.json')); const e=idx.elements||[]; console.log('missing:',e.filter(x=>x.headerStatus==='missing').length,'stale:',e.filter(x=>x.headerStatus==='stale').length,'defined:',e.filter(x=>x.headerStatus==='defined').length,'total:',e.length);"

Check capability and layer field population: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const idx=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.coderef/index.json')); const e=idx.elements||[]; console.log('capability populated:',e.filter(x=>x.capability&&x.capability.length>0).length,'layer populated:',e.filter(x=>x.metadata&&x.metadata.layer).length,'total:',e.length);"
Check RAG index record count: node dist/src/cli/rag-status.js 2>&1 | head -20
Record baseline: total elements, defined/stale/missing counts, capability/layer population, RAG vector count. This is the pre-self-scan snapshot.

acceptance_criteria: Capability and layer field population counts confirmed

phases.name: Header Refresh — Improve Self-Knowledge Quality

tasks.description: Run populate-coderef --overwrite-headers to refresh stale headers across all src/ files: node dist/src/cli/populate.js --overwrite-headers --source-headers
Re-scan to refresh index after header overwrite: node dist/src/cli/coderef-scan.js

Re-measure capability and layer population after refresh: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const idx=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.coderef/index.json')); const e=idx.elements||[]; console.log('capability populated:',e.filter(x=>x.capability&&x.capability.length>0).length,'layer populated:',e.filter(x=>x.metadata&&x.metadata.layer).length,'defined:',e.filter(x=>x.headerStatus==='defined').length,'stale:',e.filter(x=>x.headerStatus==='stale').length);"
Verify that defined count increased and stale count decreased. If capability/layer still 0, document as a parse gap (semantic headers exist but populate doesn't extract into element metadata fields).

acceptance_criteria: Stale count confirmed or delta measured

phases.name: RAG Index Rebuild — Embed Refreshed Knowledge

tasks.description: Rebuild RAG index with Ollama provider after header refresh: node dist/src/cli/rag-index.js --provider ollama 2>&1 | tail -10
Verify new record count: node dist/src/cli/rag-status.js 2>&1 | head -20
Confirm vector count increased from 1156 baseline. If count unchanged or error, diagnose and document.

acceptance_criteria: RAG index rebuild completed with Ollama provider

phases.name: Self-RAG Query Pass — Surface Improvement Signal

tasks.description: Query 1 — undocumented modules: node dist/src/cli/rag-search.js 'module without capability or layer metadata' --top-k 10 2>&1
Query 2 — architectural flow: node dist/src/cli/rag-search.js 'pipeline orchestration scanner to indexer data flow' --top-k 10 2>&1
Query 3 — improvement opportunities: node dist/src/cli/rag-search.js 'complex function without test coverage gap analyzer' --top-k 10 2>&1
Query 4 — type constraints (working constraint): node dist/src/cli/rag-search.js 'exported service' --constraint type:class --top-k 10 2>&1
Query 5 — missing semantic annotations: node dist/src/cli/rag-search.js 'export without constraints used_by annotation semantic header' --top-k 10 2>&1
Query 6 — RAG self-description (meta): node dist/src/cli/rag-search.js 'RAG index build pipeline rag-index rag-search CLI' --top-k 10 2>&1
For each query: record top 3 results (file path, score, snippet). Note patterns: which modules appear repeatedly, which have low scores or empty snippets.

acceptance_criteria: All 6 queries executed and results captured
Top results for each query recorded
Patterns across queries identified (repeated files, score distribution)

phases.name: Synthesis — Produce Self-Scan Report

tasks.description: Write coderef/workorder/coderef-core-self-scan-ideation/self-scan-report.md with sections: (1) Executive Summary, (2) Header Coverage Snapshot (before/after Phase 2), (3) RAG Index Health, (4) Query Results by Category, (5) Top Improvement Opportunities, (6) Known Gaps Blocking Quality, (7) Recommended Next Steps.
Verify report surfaces at least 5 concrete improvement opportunities. Verify each opportunity has a file path, a description, and a suggested action (file stub, WO, or annotation).

Commit the self-scan report and workorder artifacts: git add coderef/workorder/coderef-core-self-scan-ideation/ && git commit -m 'feat(self-scan): WO-CODEREF-CORE-SELF-SCAN-IDEATION-001 — self-scan report and proposal'

acceptance_criteria: At least 5 concrete improvement opportunities identified with file paths
Known gaps section references WO-LEVERAGE-AUDIT-FRESH-PASS-001 findings

self_scan_workflow_design.summary: CODEREF-CORE self-scan loop: populate-coderef --overwrite-headers → coderef-scan → rag-index --provider ollama → rag-search <improvement queries> → synthesize report. Repeatable on a cadence (e.g., after each major WO close). The self-scan index becomes the knowledge base for the tool's own improvement roadmap.

undocumented_modules: module without capability or layer metadata

known_constraints: layer constraint broken — use type constraint instead
capability/layer fields may be 0 even after header refresh (parse gap)
follow_on_wos: WO to propagate @layer into vector chunk metadata (Ph5 finding from leverage audit)
WO to implement --max-tokens truncation in rag-search CLI (Ph7 finding)
WO to parse capability/layer from semantic headers into element metadata
